Appearance

KiwiPanel

A lightweight OpenLiteSpeed stack panel

Introduction
Install
Github

🧩 Made for WordPress & PHP

Run WordPress and PHP sites using OpenLiteSpeed, MariaDB, and PHP with clean and safe defaults.

⚡ Simple & Lightweight

Built with Golang. It runs fast on small VPS servers with low memory. You can install KiwiPanel on a VPS with 512MB RAM.

🛡️ Safe by Default

Helps you set up SSL, firewall, and basic security without breaking your websites.

🌱 Source-available

License: Source-available. Free for personal use. See GitHub

🔓 No Lock-In

Remove KiwiPanel at any time. Your WordPress and PHP sites will keep working as normal.

👀 Clear Server Setup

Uses standard Linux config files and services, so you always know what is happening on your server.

​
